LanguageData.CureAbasia.label: neural mechanite purge
LanguageData.CureAbasia.description: A specialized surgical procedure that uses a targeted mechanite dose to reconstruct the motor pathways disrupted by shell shock. The mechanites trace and restore the severed neural connections that trauma has rendered non-functional, returning the patient's ability to walk immediately. Requires large quantities of ultratech medicine.
LanguageData.CureAbasia.successfullyRemovedHediffMess: {0} has successfully restored {1}'s motor function, curing their shell shock.
